sglang.title: add deepgemm and sglang fp8 block-wise gemm benchmark
sglang.author: BBuf
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
The script benchmark all FP8 w8a8 block-wise matrix multiplications involved in DeepSeek V3/R1 under the current tensor parallelism (TP) setting with DeepGemm and vLLM/SGLang.
Conclusion : The FP8 block-wise GEMM of DeepGeem consistently outperforms the SGLang/VLLM implementation under all circumsta

vllm.title: [v1][Bugfix] Only cache blocks that are not in the prefix cache
vllm.author: heheda12345
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Pass correct num_cached_blocks to cache_full_blocks to remove the additional check inside that function.

vllm.title: [v1] Add `__repr__` to KVCacheBlock to avoid recursive print
vllm.author: heheda12345
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
As KVCacheBlock is a doubly linked list, the default print of one block will recursively print all KVCacheBlock objects in the list, and can cause stack overflow. To avoid this problem, print prev_block_id and next_block_id instead.

Reproduce script
from vllm.multimodal.inputs import MultiModalKwar

vllm.title: [Misc] Accurately capture the time of loading weights
vllm.author: waltforme
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR tries to better capture the time of loading weights.
As we know, there are two major phases when loading a model: (A) downloading model if not in cache, and (B) loading weights.
Due to the lazy nature of generators that yield tensors one by one, the downloading phase is not executed until a
